title: A Stand's Bizarre Journey (JoJo Modpack)
description:
Stand powers meet true RPG progression.
A performance-focused Fabric modpack featuring Hexcasting magic, class-based builds, and a deeply reworked world designed for long, meaningful playthroughs
body:
# 🎭 A Stand’s Bizarre Journey 2.2 — RPG Reimagined

**A Stand’s Bizarre Journey** is a performance-focused **RPG Fabric modpack** built around Stand abilities, logic-based **Hexcasting magic**, and a massive, interconnected **skill tree progression system**.

Version **2.2** transforms Minecraft into a true RPG experience — where builds matter, choices are permanent, and character growth defines your journey.

Built for **long-term playthroughs**, not one-time runs.

---

![Stand-based RPG gameplay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2817c92f5cf5c2fcb6d6ac2393e9e9ab8d0fe611.png)

## ⚔️ Core Gameplay Systems

### 🜂 Stand Combat System
Fight alongside your summoned Stand using fast, responsive combat mechanics.  
Stand power scales with **player progression and skill investment**, not just equipment.

Barrages, abilities, and synergies evolve as your build grows.

---

### 🌌 Skill Tree & RPG Progression (Core Feature)

Character progression is driven by a **large-scale, non-linear skill tree**, allowing deep specialization and hybrid builds.

![Skill Tree progression overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df1777e059794a82b3bc9cbfe5168f9b87377df4.png)

- Hundreds of interconnected nodes
- Multiple progression paths (combat, magic, utility, hybrid)
- Long-term planning over instant power spikes
- Meaningful choices — no single “correct” build

Your character is shaped by decisions, not presets.

---

### ✨ Magic Systems
- **Hexcasting** — logic-based spell programming using geometric patterns  
- **Spell Engine** — unified mana and ability resource system  
- Deep interaction between magic, skills, and Stand abilities

Magic rewards understanding, planning, and experimentation.

---

### 🛡️ Classes & Build Diversity
Create holy warriors, spellcasters, Stand-focused fighters, or complex hybrid builds.  
Class identity emerges naturally from the **skill tree**, gear, and ability choices.

Combat systems and animations are fully synchronized for smooth, readable fights.

---

## 🏛️ World & Exploration

![Enhanced exploration and world generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8abf76ab37f0e7906b7b51e509ea5980b19fb2cb.jpeg)

- **Terralith & Structory** — expanded biomes and settlements  
- **YUNG’s Better Structures** — redesigned dungeons, temples, and fortresses  
- **Naturalist** — living ecosystems with realistic AI  
- **Farmer’s Delight** — deeper farming and survival mechanics

Exploration feeds progression — resources, knowledge, and risk all matter.

---

## ⚙️ Performance & Stability

Despite its depth, the modpack is heavily optimized for **stable FPS and low memory usage**.

### 🚀 Optimization Stack
- **Sodium, Iris, Indium, Continuity**
- **ModernFix & FerriteCore**
- **ImmediatelyFast & EntityCulling**
- **Krypton & Memory Leak Fix**

Designed to run smoothly on **mid-range systems**, even during extended sessions.

---

## 🌍 Localization Support

The modpack includes built-in localization via resource packs.

To enable translations:
1. Open **Resource Packs**
2. Enable:
   - **ASBJ_Fixes_UA** — Ukrainian localization & fixes  
   - **Minecraft-Mod-Language-Modpack** — global mod translations (Chinese)

![Localization setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7732a95de64df9f51e3915fb0b2659e0184cc5ac.png)

---

## 💬 Community & Feedback

Have ideas, balance suggestions, or found a bug?  
Join the community and help shape future updates.

👉 **[Join the Discord Server](https://discord.gg/7cPdj3c3tp)**

---

**A Stand’s Bizarre Journey** is not about rushing to the endgame.  
It’s about building a character — one decision at a time.
